caption.full:
Ruari Spooner joins Bill Burr and Chris O'Dowd in new comedy Bender

Ruari Spooner has joined the cast of the upcoming comedy film Bender, currently filming in Belfast. The story follows a gang plotting to lose their virginity at a papal mass in late-'70s Dublin. Bill Burr's character convinces the gang this is their best chance before graduating.

Would you watch this coming-of-age comedy, or does the papal mass setup miss the mark?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #Hollywood #BenderMovie #BillBurr
caption.firstComment: Can't decide if this is genius or outrageous — Ruari as the gang leader plotting this stunt feels like peak late-'70s chaos, what's your take?

youtube.title: Ruari Spooner Leads Virginity Plot in 'Bender' Comedy
youtube.description:
Ruari Spooner joins the cast of the comedy film Bender, currently filming in Belfast. Spooner plays the leader of a gang whose plan to lose their virginity at a papal mass is conceived by Bill Burr's character. The film also stars Chris O'Dowd, Ruth Bradley, and Kitty Graham.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
